name: nx
description: Fig completions for Nx by Nrwl

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: Adds nx.json file and installs nx if not installed already

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version number

subcommands.name: generate
subcommands.description: Runs a generator that creates and/or modifies files based on a generator from a collection

options.name: --defaults
options.description: When true, disables interactive input prompts for options with a default

options.name: --dryRun
options.description: When true, preview the changes without updating files

options.name: --force
options.description: When true, forces overwriting of existing files

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Enable/disable prompts

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version number

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: Runs an Architect target with an optional custom builder configuration defined in your project

name: --configuration
-c
options.description: A named builder configuration, defined in the "configurations" section of the workspace configuration file. The builder uses the named configuration to run the given target

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version number

subcommands.name: daemon
subcommands.description: Prints information about the Nx Daemon process or starts a daemon process

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version number

subcommands.name: graph
subcommands.description: Graph dependencies within workspace

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Exclude certain projects from being processed

options.name: --file
options.description: Output file (e.g. --file=output.json or --file=dep-graph.html)

options.name: --focus
options.description: Use to show the project graph for a particular project and every node that is either an ancestor or a descendant

options.name: --groupByFolder
options.description: Group projects by folder in the project graph

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help

options.name: --host
options.description: Bind the project graph server to a specific ip address

options.name: --open
options.description: Open the project graph in the browser

options.name: --port
options.description: Bind the project graph server to a specific port

options.name: --targets
options.description: Targets (comma/space delimited)

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version number

options.name: --view
options.description: Choose whether to view the projects or task graph

options.name: --watch
options.description: Watch for changes to project graph and update in-browser

subcommands.name: run-many
subcommands.description: Run target for multiple listed projects

options.name: --all
options.description: All projects

name: --configuration
-c
options.description: A named builder configuration, defined in the "configurations" section of the workspace configuration file. The builder uses the named configuration to run the given target

options.name: --graph
options.description: Show the task graph of the command

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help

options.name: --nx-bail
options.description: Stop command execution after the first failed task

options.name: --nx-ignore-cycles
options.description: Ignore cycles in the task graph

options.name: --output-style
options.description: Defines how Nx emits outputs tasks logs

options.name: --parallel
options.description: Max number of parallel processes [default is 3]

options.name: --projects
options.description: Projects (comma/space delimited)

options.name: --runner
options.description: This is the name of the tasks runner configured in nx.json

options.name: --skip-nx-cache
options.description: Rerun the tasks even when the results are available in the cache

options.description: Targets (comma/space delimited)

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Prints additional information about the commands (e.g., stack traces)

subcommands.name: migrate
subcommands.description: Creates a migrations file or runs migrations from the migrations file

options.name: --commitPrefix
options.description: Commit prefix to apply to the commit for each migration, when --create-commits is enabled

options.name: --createCommits
options.description: Automatically create a git commit after each migration runs

options.name: --excludeAppliedMigrations
options.description: Exclude migrations that should have been applied on previous updates. To be used with --from

options.name: --from
options.description: Use the provided versions for packages instead of the ones installed in node_modules (e.g., --from="@nrwl/react@12.0.0,@nrwl/js@12.0.0")

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help

options.name: --ifExists
options.description: Run migrations only if the migrations file exists, if not continues successfully

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Enable/disable prompts

options.name: --runMigrations
options.description: Execute migrations from a file (when the file isn't provided, execute migrations from migrations.json)

options.name: --to
options.description: Use the provided versions for packages instead of the ones calculated by the migrator (e.g., --to="@nrwl/react@12.0.0,@nrwl/js@12.0.0")

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version number

subcommands.name: view-logs
subcommands.description: Enables you to view and interact with the logs via the advanced analytic UI from Nx Cloud to help you debug your issue. To do this, Nx needs to connect your workspace to Nx Cloud and upload the most recent run details. Only the metrics are uploaded, not the artefacts
